p0_root_cause_for_brain: Three widgets defined `def _render(self) -> None` as a private content-update helper. That name shadows textual.widget.Widget._render which the framework calls to obtain a Visual. Our override returned None, then Visual.to_strips crashed. Fix = rename to _refresh_view + pass initial content to super().__init__. Brain entry `textual-render-shadowing-pitfall` shipping next.
